nodes.label: React + Vite Setup
nodes.rationale: Minimal setup to get React working in Vite with HMR and ESLint rules

nodes.label: React Logo
nodes.description: The official React logo rendered as an SVG icon. It depicts the React atom symbol: three elliptical orbits arranged around a central filled circle, all rendered in the signature cyan/aqua color #00D8FF. The design is sourced from the Iconify logos collection and represents the React JavaScript UI library brand.
